headline: Marathon Petroleum Meeting Puts Governance Changes And Shareholder Influence In Focus
summary: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) has set the date for its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting agenda includes a proposed amendment to the company’s Certificate of Incorporation. The amendment is expected to address elements of corporate governance that affect shareholder rights and company procedures. For investors tracking NYSE:MPC, the timing of this announcement comes with the stock at a share price of $243.91 and a value score of 4. Over recent periods, the stock has recorded...
